must_include: what physical state or effect this quantity describes

source_context.title: Velocity
source_context.summary: A physical quantity describing rate and direction of position change over time.

sections.definition_section: Velocity is the rate of change of position with respect to time.
sections.meaning_section: Velocity is important for describing motion.
sections.modern_section: In relativity, velocity remains fundamental but transforms under Lorentz transformation.
